decks.name: Johto Pokédex: Generation II
decks.description: All 100 Pokémon of Generation II (#152 to #251), with official artwork. Name each one from its picture; answers include Pokédex number and type.

decks.name: Kanto Pokédex: The Original 151
decks.description: All 151 Pokémon from the original Kanto Pokédex, with official artwork. Name each one from its picture; answers include Pokédex number and type.
